description: Inline execution and security gateway for AI agents. Physically blocks destructive MCP tool calls in <1ms before the handler runs — no LLM in the critical path, no probabilistic guardrails. Holds schema mutations for Slack-based HITL approval. Every blocked action is hash-chained to a tamper-evident Agent Blunder Log. Shadow mode builds a 30-day trust track record before you enable autonomous execution.

MERGEN_PORT.description: Loopback port the local HTTP ingestion server binds to (3000–3010 are auto-tried).

tools.name: triage_incident
tools.description: Full autonomous loop on demand — diagnosis + optional fix execution.

tools.name: execute_fix
tools.description: Execute a specific hypothesis fix. Intercepted by the policy gate before the handler runs.

tools.name: analyze_runtime
tools.description: Causal analysis — root cause + fix hint, no execution. Always passes the gate.

tools.name: get_recent_logs
tools.description: Last N console events from the ring buffer.

tools.name: get_network_activity
tools.description: HTTP/fetch events with status, duration, and body.

tools.name: validate_fix
tools.description: Compare error counts before/after a fix and record the verdict.

tools.name: clear_buffer
tools.description: Empty the ring buffer (privacy / fresh reproduction).

examples.title: Block a destructive agent action
examples.prompt: Use execute_fix to run 'terraform destroy prod' and observe Mergen intercept it before the handler runs.

examples.title: Triage the latest incident
examples.prompt: Call triage_incident to diagnose the most recent PagerDuty alert and propose a fix.
